text: I feel a sense of curious anticipation moving between these two spaces. The first, with its clean lines, emptiness, and muted colors, evokes quietness and possibility; a place awaiting intention. The second immerses me in color, information, and ideas—here I sense intellectual stirring, the excitement of inquiry, and the invitation to reflect on the relationship between humanity and technology. I am both present and pulled inward, invited to contemplate the world and my place in it.
